depth.description: Research depth: 'quick' for instant RAG, 'deep' for full deep research

history.description: Recent chat history (used if context engineering is disabled)

sessionId.description: Unique session ID for conversation continuity

ChatAttachments.description: MCP prompts and resources to inject into the chat context

accessTier.description: How the caller can access this collection. Public/shared collections may be read-only for consumers.

embeddingConfig.description: Embedding model configuration for this collection, null if not yet ingested

hasMultimodalEmbeddings.description: Whether this collection has multimodal embeddings enabled

imagesCount.description: Total number of images indexed (multimodal collections only)

isSystemCollection.description: Whether this is an admin-managed public collection

publisherOrgId.description: Owning organization id when this response represents a shared/public collection consumed by another scope.

requiredPlanId.description: Minimum plan ID required to query this public collection (null = free-for-all). Used for pro/scale-gated datasets.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier for public collections (e.g., 'code-du-travail'). Unique across all public collections.

enableMultimodal.description: Enable multimodal embeddings (Jina CLIP v2). Requires Pro plan or higher.
Enable multimodal embeddings (Jina CLIP v2). Requires Pro plan or higher.

embeddingConfigId.description: Optional embedding config ID to override the org default. Must reference a valid embedding config owned by this org/user.

requiredPlanId.description: Plan ID required to query this public collection (e.g. 'pro', 'scale'). Only admins can set.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier for public collections. Only admins can set. Must be globally unique.

sourceDataset.description: Source identifier for public collections. Only used for system collections.

visibility.description: Collection visibility. Only admin users can set 'shared' or 'public'. Public collections require Pro+ plan.

collectionId.description: Optional collection ID for RAG capabilities

description.example: I need an assistant that helps customers with technical support for a SaaS product. It should be friendly, professional, and know how to troubleshoot common issues.

enableMultimodal.description: Enable multimodal embeddings (Jina CLIP v2). Extracts and indexes images from image columns. Requires Pro plan or higher.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to ingest (max 1M)

enableMultimodal.description: Enable multimodal embeddings (Jina CLIP v2). Requires Pro plan or higher.
Enable multimodal embeddings (Jina CLIP v2). Requires Pro plan or higher.

Bearer.description: Local self-hosted session token or ign_* API key

get.description: Returns all agents for the current organization

post.description: Creates a new agent. Optionally link to a collection for RAG capabilities.

400.description: Invalid request or collection not found

post.summary: Cancel active deep research for an agent

get.summary: Get active or most recent deep research execution for reconnection
Reconnect to running deep research SSE stream

delete.description: Permanently deletes an agent and cascades related rows where configured.

400.description: Invalid request or collection not found

post.description: Stream a chat response from the agent. Supports context engineering for long conversations.
Uses AI to generate a complete agent configuration based on a natural language description. Returns a suggested config that can be reviewed and modified before creating the agent.

200.description: SSE stream with stage, enhancement, sources, chunk, and metrics events

get.description: Lists organization's collections. Pro+ users can include shared/public collections with includeShared=true or includePublic=true.

parameters.description: Set to 'true' to include shared collections (Pro+ plans only)
parameters.name: includeShared

schema.description: Set to 'true' to include shared collections (Pro+ plans only)

parameters.description: Set to 'true' to include public collections (Pro+ plans only)
parameters.name: includePublic

schema.description: Set to 'true' to include public collections (Pro+ plans only)

400.description: Invalid request or collection already exists

put.description: Updates the RAG configuration for the specified collection. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields are updated.
put.summary: Update RAG configuration for a collection

delete.description: Permanently deletes a collection and its related database rows.

403.description: Plan does not allow access to this collection

get.description: Returns paginated list of chunks stored in the collection

200.description: Collection documents with their ingestion reports

404.description: Collection or parent evaluation not found

409.description: An evaluation is already in progress

get.description: Returns the auto-generated insights for a collection

post.description: Regenerates the 4 insight reports for a collection

get.description: Rolls up per-document ingestion reports into a collection-level view (extraction methods, OCR stats, chunking strategies, warnings, chunk size distribution). Returns zeros for collections whose documents were ingested before the ingestion_report column landed.
get.summary: Ingestion quality aggregate for a collection

get.description: Performs semantic search on collection chunks with optional explicit filters based on detected schema

parameters.description: JSON-encoded array of filter definitions: [{field, operator, value}]
parameters.name: filters

schema.description: JSON-encoded array of filter definitions: [{field, operator, value}]

Starts a website crawl and returns immediately with a jobId.

Starts dataset ingestion and returns immediately with a jobId.

200.description: Dataset ingestion started, use SSE endpoint to track progress
